subcodes.first_line: Verily, the servant in attendance desireth to adorn the head of his book with that which the All-Merciful hath revealed in the Qur'án, and to make it his practice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الخادم یحب ان یزین راس کتابه بما انزله الرحمن فی الفرقان و یجعله سجیه
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @diversity an attribute; requirement of existence, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
